name: Beds24 API V2
description: Beds24 RESTful API enables property management, booking operations, inventory control, and channel management. Uses modern token-based authentication with scoped access. For more information see [wiki.beds24.com/index.php/API_V2.0](https://wiki.beds24.com/index.php/API_V2.0)
